channel.title: Server-Side Security on gobakos --verbose
channel.description: Recent content in Server-Side Security on gobakos --verbose

item.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF): protocols, bypasses, and defenses
item.description: What SSRF is, which HTTP clients support which URL schemes, the three families of filter bypass (parser confusion, DNS rebinding, IP encoding), and how to defend against them in code and infrastructure.
